subcodes.title: Answer to Mirza Muhammad 'Ali Qazvini
subcodes.first_line: Know thou, O noble brother! Plant thy feet firmly upon the beauteous path of God, and know that God, glorified be He, created naught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. فاعلم یا اخ الجلیل و اثبت قدمیک علی صراط الله الجمیل و اعرف ان الله سبحانه ما خلق شیئا
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
